androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Constra:
<ImageView android:id="@+id/iv_product_image" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="102dp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_image_container" android:clipToOutline="true" android:contentDescription="Product image" android:scaleType="centerCrop" <<<<<<< HEAD ======= android:src="@drawable/epigamia" >>>>>>> e24a567d8ac8039753a386af752c39232bc39929 app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />

>>>>>>> e24a567d8ac8039753a386af752c39232bc39929 <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_product_name" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:layout_marginEnd="12dp" android:ellipsize="end" android:fontFamily="sans-serif" android:maxLines="2" <<<<<<< HEAD android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" ======= android:text="Epigamia" android:textColor="#101828" >>>>>>> e24a567d8ac8039753a386af752c39232bc39929 android:textSize="13sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/iv_product_image" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_product_quantity" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:layout_marginEnd="12dp" android:fontFamily="sans-serif" <<<<<<< HEAD android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" ======= android:text="90g" android:textColor="#99A1AF" >>>>>>> e24a567d8ac8039753a386af752c39232bc39929 android:textSize="11sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tv_product_name" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_product_price" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-black" <<<<<<< HEAD android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" ======= android:text="₹66" android:textColor="#101828" >>>>>>> e24a567d8ac8039753a386af752c39232bc39929 android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
